Tomato_Early_blight.en_reason: Fungal disease due to moisture and poor air circulation.
Tomato_Early_blight.en_solution: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicide.

Rice_Bacterialblight.en_reason: Bacterial infection due to high humidity.
Rice_Bacterialblight.en_solution: Use resistant varieties and avoid excess nitrogen.

Wheat_Rust.en_solution: Apply fungicide and use resistant seeds.

Tomato_Late_blight.en_reason: Fungal disease due to wet conditions.
Tomato_Late_blight.en_solution: Use fungicide and remove infected parts.
